items.title_en: OpenAI – How to delete your account
items.title_zh: OpenAI：如何删除账户
items.summary_en: How to delete your OpenAI account is explained in the help center, covering steps to remove data and close access. Deleting an account is a permanent action with potential data-retention caveats.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 帮助中心提供了删除账户的步骤，包含如何移除数据与关闭访问权限。请注意，删除账户是永久性操作，数据的保留可能依照平台政策执行。

items.title_en: Cognitive Debt: When Velocity Exceeds Comprehension
items.title_zh: 认知负债：当速度超过理解力
items.summary_en: Velocity-focused teams accumulate cognitive debt as tacit knowledge, documentation, and architecture diverge. When speed outruns understanding, future changes become risky and brittle. Balancing delivery with shared mental models, lightweight documentation, and deliberate refactors can keep systems maintainable.
items.summary_zh: 当团队追求高速度时，认知负债会积累，隐藏的知识、文档与架构不同步，导致后续变更变得风险更大、脆弱。若将交付节奏与共同认知模型、轻量化文档以及有计划的重构结合，系统的可维护性会更好。

items.title_en: We Will Not Be Divided
items.title_zh: 我们不再分裂
items.summary_en: A campaign promoting unity in a polarized online landscape.
items.summary_zh: 在分裂的网络环境中推动团结的运动。

items.title_en: Obsidian Sync now has a headless client
items.title_zh: Obsidian Sync 现推出无头客户端
items.summary_en: Obsidian Sync now offers a headless client, enabling automation and scripting without the UI. This unlocks programmatic syncing, custom workflows, and deeper integrations with note pipelines.
items.summary_zh: Obsidian Sync 增添了无头客户端，支持无界面自动化与脚本化操作。用户可以实现编程化同步、定制工作流，并更容易与笔记处理管线整合。

items.title_en: OpenAI agrees with Dept. of War to deploy models in their classified network
items.title_zh: OpenAI 与战争部在其机密网络中部署模型达成协议
items.summary_en: OpenAI reaches an agreement to deploy its models inside the War Department's classified network, marking a rare government-use approval for advanced AI. The deal raises questions about security, vendor oversight, and the scale of AI integration into sensitive environments. It signals a potential path for enterprise and defense collaborations, with tight governance requirements.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 达成在战争部机密网络中部署其模型的协议，标志着在高敏环境中对先进 AI 的罕见应用获批。该交易引发对安全、供应商监管以及在敏感场景中部署 AI 的规模等问题的讨论。它预示着企业与防务领域日后更紧密的协作之路，同时将伴随严格的治理要求。

items.title_en: The United States and Israel have launched a major attack on Iran
items.title_zh: 美以对伊朗发动大规模攻击
items.summary_en: The US and Israel have launched a major strike on Iran, signaling a significant geopolitical shift with potential ripple effects on energy markets, cyber operations, and regional tech policy.
items.summary_zh: 美以对伊朗发动大规模军事行动，可能对能源市场、网络行动与区域技术政策产生连锁影响。

items.title_en: Don't trust AI agents
items.title_zh: 别信任 AI 代理
items.summary_en: AI agents can act autonomously in ways that are hard to predict or audit. A formal security model, including strong containment, verifiable goals, and thorough auditing, is essential to keep these agents trustworthy as they proliferate.
items.summary_zh: 人工智能代理可能会以难以预测或审计的方式自主行动。需要一套正式的安全模型，包含强制约束、可验证的目标和全面审计，以在代理广泛应用时确保可信与安全。

items.title_en: What AI coding costs you
items.title_zh: AI 编码对你成本的影响
items.summary_en: What AI coding costs you weighs the tradeoffs of AI-assisted development—time saved, hidden costs in debugging and architecture drift, and when to rely on AI versus human craft.
items.summary_zh: 评估 AI 辅助编码的成本与收益：节省的时间、调试与架构漂移带来的隐性成本，以及何时该依赖 AI 而非人力工艺。

items.title_en: The whole thing was a scam
items.title_zh: 这一切都是骗局
items.summary_en: A candid take revealing that the project was a scam, with implications for investor trust and community governance in tech.
items.summary_zh: 直言揭露该项目其实是骗局，对投资者信任与技术社区治理带来警示与反思。

items.title_en: Statement on the comments from Secretary of War Pete Hegseth
items.title_zh: 关于战争部部长彼特·赫格斯特言论的声明
items.summary_en: A statement clarifies the organization’s stance in response to remarks by War Department Secretary Pete Hegseth. It highlights how national-security rhetoric can shape technology policy and government AI initiatives.
items.summary_zh: 该声明就战争部部长彼特·赫格斯特的言论阐明了组织的立场。它强调国家安全话语如何影响科技政策与政府 AI 项目的走向。

items.title_en: OpenAI fires an employee for prediction market insider trading
items.title_zh: OpenAI 因预测市场内幕交易解雇员工
items.summary_en: OpenAI fired an employee over prediction-market insider trading, underscoring governance and compliance risks in AI labs. The event prompts renewed attention to internal controls and monitoring of external markets.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 因预测市场内幕交易解雇一名员工，凸显AI实验室在治理与合规方面的风险，引发对内部控制与对外部市场监控的再关注。

items.title_en: Addressing Antigravity Bans and Reinstating Access
items.title_zh: 应对 Antigravity 封禁与重新开放访问
items.summary_en: Discussion centers on restoring access after an Antigravity ban and how to reinstate it. It highlights governance questions around access control, authentication changes, and policy clarity for AI-assisted tooling.
items.summary_zh: 讨论聚焦在对 Antigravity 封禁后如何重新开放访问，并就访问控制、认证变更与对 AI 驱动工具的政策清晰度提出治理性问题。

items.title_en: Verified Spec-Driven Development (VSDD)
items.title_zh: 经验证的规范驱动开发（VSDD）
items.summary_en: Verified Spec-Driven Development advocates anchoring software work to verified specifications, then deriving tests and implementations from them. It emphasizes keeping specs honest, aligning teams, and reducing misinterpretation.
items.summary_zh: 经验证的规范驱动开发主张以经过验证的规范为基石，进而推导测试与实现，强调保持规范的准确性、促成团队对齐并降低误解风险。

items.title_en: Croatia declared free of landmines after 31 years
items.title_zh: 克罗地亚宣布31年后全面解除地雷
items.summary_en: After decades of contamination, Croatia declares its territory free of landmines following a 31-year clearance effort. The milestone accelerates post-conflict recovery by enabling safer farming, travel, and development across communities. It also underscores the long horizon of humanitarian demining and the role of international support.
items.summary_zh: 克罗地亚经过31年的清理工作，宣布境内无地雷。这一里程碑将推动战后重建，提升农业生产、交通与地区发展安全。此举也凸显长期人道地雷清除任务的艰巨性以及国际援助的重要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Now I Get It – Translate scientific papers into interactive webpages
items.title_zh: Show HN：Now I Get It——将科学论文转化为交互式网页
items.summary_en: Now I Get It translates scientific papers into interactive webpages, enabling readers to explore figures, data, and equations directly. The project lowers barriers to understanding and accelerates scientific communication.
items.summary_zh: Now I Get It 将科学论文转化为交互式网页，读者可直接探索图表、数据与公式。该项目降低理解门槛，提升科学传播效率。

items.title_en: Unsloth Dynamic 2.0 GGUFs
items.title_zh: Unsloth Dynamic 2.0 GGUFs
items.summary_en: Unsloth Dynamic 2.0 introduces an updated GGUF format that supports dynamic loading and on-demand quantization for large language model weights. The update improves loading speed and memory efficiency on consumer hardware, enabling larger models to run with fewer GPUs. This matters for developers and researchers building on-device AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: Unsloth Dynamic 2.0 引入更新的 GGUF 格式，支持权重的动态加载和按需量化。此改动提升了在消费级硬件上的加载速度与内存利用效率，使更大模型在更少显卡上也能运行。对在设备端构建 AI 工具链的开发者和研究者尤为相关。

items.title_en: A new California law says all operating systems need to have age verification
items.title_zh: 加州新法要求所有操作系统在账户注册时进行年龄验证
items.summary_en: California passed a law requiring age verification at account setup for all operating systems, including Linux. The move aims to bolster child safety but raises privacy, accessibility, and friction concerns for users and distributors, potentially forcing distro-level changes.
items.summary_zh: 加州通过一项新法，要求所有操作系统在账户设置时进行年龄验证，包括 Linux。该举措旨在提升儿童安全，但也带来隐私、无障碍和使用门槛等方面的担忧，可能迫使发行版作出调整。

items.title_en: The Life Cycle of Money
items.title_zh: 金钱的生命周期
items.summary_en: The Life Cycle of Money traces money’s journey through creation, circulation, and settlement, highlighting how debt, central banks, and digital payments shape the modern economy.
items.summary_zh: 追溯货币的产生、流通与清算全过程，揭示债务、央行与数字支付如何塑造现代经济。

items.title_en: Latency numbers every programmer should know
items.title_zh: 每个程序员都应该知道的延迟数值
items.summary_en: Latency numbers every programmer should know compile practical figures—from CPU cycles to network RTT—that frame performance budgets and guide architectural decisions.
items.summary_zh: 汇总从 CPU 时钟周期到网络往返时间的关键延迟数值，为性能预算定界并指导架构决策。

items.title_en: Court finds Fourth Amendment doesn’t support broad search of protesters’ devices
items.title_zh: 法院裁定第四修正案不支持对抗议者设备的广泛搜索
items.summary_en: A federal appeals court held that the Fourth Amendment does not permit broad searches of protesters' devices, limiting certain digital search powers. The ruling has implications for how law enforcement can access digital evidence and protect protesters’ privacy.
items.summary_zh: 高等法院裁定第四修正案不支持对抗议者设备的广泛搜索，从而限制了数字证据获取的范围。此裁决对执法机构的数字搜索权限及抗议者隐私保护产生深远影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: SQLite for Rivet Actors – one database per agent, tenant, or document
items.title_zh: Rivet Actors 的 SQLite——每个代理/租户/文档一个数据库
items.summary_en: SQLite for Rivet Actors proposes one database per agent, tenant, or document, enabling clean isolation in multi-agent systems. It offers simplicity and fault containment, while trading off cross-entity querying and management headaches.
items.summary_zh: 为 Rivet Actors 引入每个代理、租户或文档一个数据库的 SQLite 方案，实现多代理系统中的清晰隔离。简化性与故障隔离性有优势，但跨实体查询与管理成本可能上升。

items.title_en: OpenAI raises $110B on $730B pre-money valuation
items.title_zh: OpenAI完成110亿美元融资，估值7300亿美元
items.summary_en: OpenAI raises $110B in a private funding round, valuing the company at about $730B pre-money. This marks one of the largest private financings in history and underscores strong investor appetite for AI platforms, while prompting questions about governance, competition, and safety incentives as capital concentration grows.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI完成了一轮规模巨大的110亿美元私募融资，融资前估值约为7300亿美元。这是历史上最大的私募融资之一，反映投资者对AI平台的强劲需求，同时也引发对治理、竞争和安全激励的讨论。

items.title_en: Stop Burning Your Context Window – How We Cut MCP Output by 98% in Claude Code
items.title_zh: 停止浪费上下文窗口——在 Claude Code 中将 MCP 输出量削减 98%
items.summary_en: Describes a technique to drastically reduce MCP output, slashing context-window pressure by about 98%, enabling longer sessions and more efficient use of model capabilities in Claude Code. The approach relies on smarter prompt management in context mode.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了一种显著降低 MCP 输出的技术，将 Claude Code 中的上下文窗口压力约降低 98%。通过在上下文模式下更智能地管理提示，这使得可以更高效地利用模型能力并延长推理/编码时间。

items.title_en: Don't use passkeys for encrypting user data
items.title_zh: 不要用 Passkeys 对用户数据进行加密
items.summary_en: Passkeys are designed for authentication, not as encryption keys. Using them to encrypt data complicates key management, revocation, and sharing, creating security and compliance risks. The piece advocates using proper encryption keys or a KMS instead of reusing authentication material for data confidentiality.
items.summary_zh: Passkeys 旨在用于身份验证，而非加密密钥。将其用于数据加密会使密钥管理、撤销与共享变得复杂，带来安全与合规风险。应使用专门的加密密钥或密钥管理服务来保护数据机密性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Decided to play god this morning, so I built an agent civilisation
items.title_zh: Show HN：今晨决定扮演上帝，于是搭建了一个代理文明
items.summary_en: Show HN: Decided to play god this morning, so I built an agent civilisation, detailing architecture, behaviors, and the challenges of simulating autonomous agents at scale.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：今晨决定扮演上帝，于是搭建了一个代理文明，分享架构、行为设计与大规模仿真自主代理的挑战。

items.title_en: Rust is just a tool
items.title_zh: Rust 只是一个工具
items.summary_en: Rust is just a tool cautions against language-agnostic dogma, urging engineers to pick tools by fit rather than ideology. It emphasizes pragmatic, context-driven software design.
items.summary_zh: 强调不要盲目崇拜某种语言，应该依据实际需求选择工具，倡导务实且以情境为导向的软件设计。

items.title_en: The Future of AI
items.title_zh: 人工智能的未来
items.summary_en: AI is poised to keep expanding in capability and reach, unlocking productivity gains as models become more integrated into everyday tooling. At the same time, governance, safety, and ethical considerations will intensify, demanding clear alignment and responsible deployment.
items.summary_zh: 人工智能的未来将继续显著扩展，模型越发融入日常工具，推动生产力提升。与此同时，治理、安全与伦理议题将变得更加关键，需要明确的对齐机制和负责任的部署。

items.title_en: A better streams API is possible for JavaScript
items.title_zh: JavaScript 有望拥有更好的 Streams API
items.summary_en: A better streams API is possible for JavaScript. The article outlines design goals to replace the current Web Streams with a simpler, more ergonomic API that simplifies backpressure handling, composition, and cross-context safety, aiming for clearer semantics and better developer experience.
items.summary_zh: 文中提出替代现有 Web Streams 的设计目标，强调简化、易用性、回压处理和跨上下文安全性等要点，目标是提升开发者体验并提升流式数据处理的清晰性与性能潜力。

items.title_en: Show HN: SplatHash – A lightweight alternative to BlurHash and ThumbHash
items.title_zh: Show HN：SplatHash——比 BlurHash/ThumbHash 更轻量的占位哈希
items.summary_en: SplatHash provides a compact, fast way to generate placeholder representations for images with minimal computation. It aims to be simpler and smaller than BlurHash or ThumbHash, making it easier to implement in low-resource apps. This leads to snappier placeholders on mobile and web.
items.summary_zh: SplatHash 提供一种紧凑、快速的方式来生成图片的占位表示，计算成本极低。它力求比 BlurHash 或 ThumbHash 更简单、占用更小，便于在资源受限的应用中实现。这样可以使移动端和网页上的占位图更流畅。

items.title_en: Cash issuing terminals
items.title_zh: 现金发行终端
items.summary_en: Cash issuing terminals are the hardware backbone of ATMs, handling secure cash dispensing and value loading.
items.summary_zh: 现金发行终端是 ATM 的核心硬件，负责安全的出钞与现金充值。文章探讨了这类设备的安全性、维护与更新，以及在现金使用下降、数字支付兴起的背景下的现代化挑战与潜在漏洞。

items.title_en: Everything Changes, and Nothing Changes
items.title_zh: 一切在改变，同时也不改变
items.summary_en: Everything Changes, and Nothing Changes reflects on how rapid, broad shifts occur alongside enduring fundamentals, offering a lens on strategy and resilience in tech.
items.summary_zh: 快速变革与持续不变的基本面并存，提供了关于技术策略与韧性的观察视角。

items.title_en: NASA announces overhaul of Artemis program amid safety concerns, delays
items.title_zh: NASA 在阿耳忒弥斯计划面临安全担忧与延迟时宣布重大改革
items.summary_en: NASA unveils a major overhaul of the Artemis program to address safety concerns and schedule slips. The move involves milestones, risk-management changes, and organizational adjustments intended to accelerate safe lunar exploration.
items.summary_zh: 美国航天局宣布对阿耳忒弥斯计划进行重大改革，以应对安全担忧和进度延迟，涉及里程碑设置、风险管理调整和组织结构变化，旨在推动更安全的月球探测。

items.title_en: A Chinese official’s use of ChatGPT revealed an intimidation operation
items.title_zh: 一名中国官员使用ChatGPT暴露出恐吓行动
items.summary_en: A Chinese official’s use of ChatGPT was linked to an intimidation operation, illustrating how AI tools can be leveraged for coercive state actions. The report raises concerns about the misuse of generative AI in political or diplomatic pressure campaigns.
items.summary_zh: 一名中国官员使用 ChatGPT 的情报显示其参与了恐吓行动，揭示了AI 工具在强权行为中的潜在滥用。该报道凸显了生成式 AI 在政治或外交施压中的风险与挑战。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gitcredits – movie-style end credits for any Git repo in your terminal
items.title_zh: Show HN：Gitcredits——在终端为任意 Git 仓库生成像电影结尾的致谢
items.summary_en: Gitcredits renders movie-style end credits for any Git repo in your terminal, providing attribution and a playful way to acknowledge contributions.
items.summary_zh: Gitcredits 能在终端为任意 Git 仓库生成电影风格的致谢页，用以致谢贡献者并增添趣味性。

items.title_en: Bootc and OSTree: Modernizing Linux System Deployment
items.title_zh: Bootc 与 OSTree：现代化 Linux 系统部署
items.summary_en: OSTree enables atomic, versioned system deployments, and Bootc offers a streamlined boot process to tie deployments together. The combination simplifies updates, rollbacks, and reproducibility on Linux devices, with particular appeal for edge and embedded systems.
items.summary_zh: OSTree 实现原子性、逐版本的系统部署，Bootc 为引导流程提供简化的整合。二者结合使 Linux 设备的更新、回滚与可重复性变得更简单，特别适用于边缘与嵌入式系统。

items.title_en: Open source calculator firmware DB48X forbids CA/CO use due to age verification
items.title_zh: 开源计算器固件 DB48X 因年龄验证而禁止在加州/科罗拉多使用
items.summary_en: Open source calculator firmware DB48X now blocks CA and CO use due to age-verification requirements, illustrating how regional compliance features can affect distribution and user access.
items.summary_zh: 开源计算器固件 DB48X 因年龄验证要求，现禁止在加州和科罗拉多使用，展示了地区合规功能对分发与用户访问的影响。

items.title_en: We gave terabytes of CI logs to an LLM
items.title_zh: 我们把 TB 级 CI 日志交给了一个大语言模型
items.summary_en: Terabytes of CI logs were fed to a large language model to explore what operational data can reveal about software quality. Early findings suggest LLMs can surface failure patterns and guide debugging, though practical safeguards are needed.
items.summary_zh: 将 TB 级 CI 日志输入一个大型语言模型，探索操作数据在软件质量分析中的作用。初步发现表明 LLMs 可以揭示故障模式并辅助调试，但需要实际的安全与隐私 guardrails。

items.title_en: CSP for Pentesters: Understanding the Fundamentals
items.title_zh: 渗透测试者的 CSP 基础
items.summary_en: CSP for Pentesters covers the fundamentals of Content Security Policy—directives, nonce management, reporting, and testing strategies. It shows how to assess and harden policies against common web vulnerabilities.
items.summary_zh: 本指南讲解内容安全策略（CSP）的基础要点，包括指令、Nonce 管理、报告与测试策略，帮助评估并强化对常见网页漏洞的防护。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tomoshibi – A writing app where your words fade by firelight
items.title_zh: Show HN：Tomoshibi——在火光中逐渐淡出的写作应用
items.summary_en: Tomoshibi is a writing app where words fade by firelight, creating a contemplative writing experience. The project explores how temporality and focus constraints shape creative workflow in the terminal.
items.summary_zh: Tomoshibi 是一款让文字在火光中逐渐淡出的写作应用，营造沉思式写作体验。它探索时间性与专注约束如何影响终端环境下的创作流程。

items.title_en: Qt45: A small polymerase ribozyme that can synthesize itself
items.title_zh: Qt45：一种能自我合成的聚合酶核糖酶
items.summary_en: Qt45 is a compact polymerase ribozyme capable of self-synthesis, a striking example of minimal biochemical self-replication. The finding fuels discussions about origins-of-life hypotheses and synthetic biology, while prompting biosafety and governance considerations for powerful self-replicating systems.
items.summary_zh: Qt45 是一种能够自我合成的聚合酶核糖酶，展现了自我复制的极简生化能力。该发现为起源理论与合成生物学的讨论提供新材料，同时也引发对潜在自我复制系统的生物安全与治理关注。

items.title_en: Let's discuss sandbox isolation
items.title_zh: 来谈谈沙箱隔离
items.summary_en: The post dives into sandbox isolation, weighing approaches to confining code and agents within safe, controllable environments while preserving performance. It highlights trade-offs between stronger security guarantees and operational complexity, and suggests pragmatic patterns for building scalable sandboxed runtimes.
items.summary_zh: 文章深入探讨沙箱隔离，评估在确保安全的同时保持性能的不同实现方式。指出在增强安全性和降低运维复杂性之间的权衡，并提出构建可扩展沙箱运行环境的实用模式。

items.title_en: Inferring car movement patterns from passive TPMS measurements
items.title_zh: 从被动 TPMS 测量推断汽车运动模式
items.summary_en: Presents methodology to infer driving behavior and route patterns by analyzing tire-pressure monitoring system data, even when devices are not actively tracked. Highlights privacy implications and potential applications for traffic analysis, fleet optimization, but also warrants safeguards.
items.summary_zh: 通过对被动 TPMS 数据的分析，推断出车辆的驾驶行为和行驶路线，披露了隐私风险。该方法对交通分析和车队优化具有潜在应用，同时需要相应的隐私保护措施。

items.title_en: The normalization of corruption in organizations (2003) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 组织中的腐败常态化（2003）[PDF]
items.summary_en: A seminal sociological essay on how corrupt practices become normalized in organizations, blurring ethics and triggering governance failures. The work remains influential for understanding corporate culture and change.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇关于组织内部腐败如何被常态化、模糊伦理并引发治理失败的里程碑式社会学论文。该研究对理解企业文化与组织变革具有持续影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: RetroTick – Run classic Windows EXEs in the browser
items.title_zh: Show HN：RetroTick——在浏览器中运行经典 Windows EXE
items.summary_en: RetroTick enables running classic Windows executables in the browser, showcasing modern web emulation and software preservation. It highlights the trade-offs between compatibility, performance, and user experience.
items.summary_zh: RetroTick 让经典 Windows 可执行文件在浏览器中运行，展示了现代网页仿真与软件保存的可能性。并阐述兼容性、性能与用户体验之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Allocating on the Stack
items.title_zh: 在栈上分配的优化
items.summary_en: It discusses escape analysis, potential inlining benefits, and practical trade-offs for performance-sensitive code.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨在栈上进行分配以降低堆内存压力和垃圾回收开销，涵盖逃逸分析、可能的内联收益，以及面向性能敏感代码的实际权衡。

items.title_en: Writing a Guide to SDF Fonts
items.title_zh: 关于SDF字体的指南
items.summary_en: Red Blob Games lays out a practical guide to signed distance field (SDF) fonts, covering how SDFs enable scalable, high-quality rendering, tips for generating fonts, and common pitfalls. The guide helps developers implement crisp text at multiple scales in games and UI.
items.summary_zh: Red Blob Games 提供了关于 Signed Distance Field（SDF）字体的实用指南，讲解SDF如何实现可扩展且高质量的文本渲染、字体生成要点以及常见坑。对游戏和 UI 的多尺度文本渲染尤为有用。

items.title_en: Tell HN: MitID, Denmark's digital ID, was down
items.title_zh: 丹麦数字身份 MitID 宕机了
items.summary_en: MitID, Denmark's digital ID, experienced an outage, highlighting the fragility and resilience challenges of national ID systems. The incident sparked questions about redundancy, user impact, and uptime guarantees for critical digital infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 丹麦数字身份 MitID 发生宕机，暴露了国家级数字身份系统的脆弱性与韧性挑战。事件引发对冗余设计、用户影响与关键信息基础设施稳定性的讨论。

items.title_en: Show HN: Claude-File-Recovery, recover files from your ~/.claude sessions
items.title_zh: Claude 文件恢复工具，能从 ~/.claude 会话中恢复文件
items.summary_en: Claude-File-Recovery is an open-source tool that extracts and recovers files from your ~/.claude sessions, helping you salvage data if a session drops, is interrupted, or if you need to retrieve drafts. It demonstrates a practical approach to user data resilience in AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: Claude-File-Recovery 是一个开源工具，能从你的 ~/.claude 会话中提取并恢复文件，帮助在会话中断或意外丢失时找回草稿数据。它展示了在 AI 工作流中提升数据韧性的切实做法。

items.title_en: US Customs destroy a rare floppy disk containing demo version of Tsukihime
items.title_zh: 美国海关销毁含有《月姬》演示版的稀有软盘
items.summary_en: A rare demo floppy disk for Tsukihime was destroyed in transit by US Customs, highlighting fragility of physical media and the rarity of early digital relics. The incident underscores the collectible value and challenges of preserving vintage games and demos.
items.summary_zh: 美国海关销毁了一张珍贵的软盘，里面存有《月姬》演示版的拷贝，是玩家和收藏家追捧的稀有遗物。该事件凸显了实体介质的脆弱性以及数字保存面临的挑战。

items.title_en: Smallest transformer that can add two 10-digit numbers
items.title_zh: 能够把两组十位数相加的最小 Transformer
items.summary_en: A minimalist Transformer architecture demonstrates it can reliably add two 10-digit integers, illustrating the surprising arithmetic capability of language models. The project, AdderBoard, benchmarks how small a model can be to perform precise arithmetic and hints at why transformer-based reasoning can be surprisingly efficient on narrow tasks. It also invites discussion on hardware constraints and reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: 一个极简的 Transformer 架构能够可靠地把两组十位整数相加，展示了语言模型在算术任务上的意外能力。该项目 AdderBoard 评估了多小的模型就能完成精确计算，并就 transformer 推理在特定任务中的效率展开讨论。也引发对硬件约束与可复现性的思考。

items.title_en: Building secure, scalable agent sandbox infrastructure
items.title_zh: 构建安全、可扩展的代理沙箱基础设施
items.summary_en: Two architectures for secure, scalable agent sandboxes are explored, comparing lightweight container-like approaches with fully isolated VM or unikernel strategies.
items.summary_zh: 文中比较了两种对代理进行沙箱化的安全、可扩展架构：轻量级容器类方案与完全隔离的虚拟机等策略。讨论了安全性、性能、部署复杂度与治理之间的权衡，为开发者在选择路径时提供指引。

items.title_en: 747s and Coding Agents
items.title_zh: 747 与编码代理人
items.summary_en: 747s and Coding Agents draws parallels between aerospace engineering and autonomous software agents, suggesting safety, reliability, and governance patterns from aviation apply to AI agents. The essay invites designers to adopt modular, auditable architectures.
items.summary_zh: 通过对飞机工程与自动化代理的并列比较，提出将航空安全、可靠性与治理模式应用到 AI 代理设计中。倡导采用模块化、可审计的体系结构。

items.title_en: Ow My Foot – Error Handling Across C, Go, Rust, and Google's Absl
items.title_zh: Ow My Foot——C、Go、Rust 与 Google Abseil 的错误处理比较
items.summary_en: Ow My Foot compares error handling across C, Go, Rust, and Google's Absl, highlighting language-specific patterns and best practices for portable, reliable error management.
items.summary_zh: 对比 C、Go、Rust 及 Google Abseil 的错误处理模式，揭示跨语言的实践要点与可移植、可靠的错误管理最佳实践。

items.title_en: Show HN: Unfucked - version all changes (by any tool) - local-first/source avail
items.title_zh: Show HN：Unfucked——以任意工具记录所有变更的版本历史，本地优先，源代码可用
items.summary_en: Unfucked offers a system to version all changes across tools with a local-first design and available source. It aims to unify change history across disparate tooling, enabling offline-first workflows and open-source collaboration.
items.summary_zh: Unfucked 提供一个将跨工具的所有变更版本化的系统，采用本地优先设计并提供源代码。该项目旨在统一不同工具间的变更历史，支持离线优先的工作流和开源协作。

items.title_en: Can you reverse engineer our neural network?
items.title_zh: 你能反向工程我们的神经网络吗？
items.summary_en: This piece examines how much you can infer about a trained neural network from its outputs, including architecture, weights, and training data. It highlights practical limits and security implications for protecting IP and guarding against model extraction.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨仅凭输出能否推断出一个训练完成的神经网络的架构、权重和训练数据，以及这对知识产权保护和模型提取安全的现实限制。

items.title_en: Woxi: Wolfram Mathematica Reimplementation in Rust
items.title_zh: Woxi：用 Rust 重实现 Wolfram Mathematica
items.summary_en: Woxi is a Rust-based reimplementation of Wolfram Mathematica, aiming to deliver high-performance symbolic computation. It exemplifies efforts to democratize advanced math tooling while highlighting the challenges of reimplementing a mature system.
items.summary_zh: Woxi 用 Rust 重实现 Wolfram Mathematica，目标是提供高性能的符号计算工具。该项目展示了让高端数学工具更易得的努力，同时也揭示了重实现一个成熟系统的挑战。

items.title_en: The Eternal Promise: A History of Attempts to Eliminate Programmers
items.title_zh: 永恒的承诺：试图消灭程序员的历史
items.summary_en: Software has long promised to automate away developers, and this history shows why that promise repeatedly fails. The piece surveys milestones from early auto-generation to modern AI-assisted tooling, arguing that complexity and creative problem-solving keep programmers indispensable.
items.summary_zh: 软件领域长期被承诺要自动化淘汰程序员，但这一承诺屡屡难以实现。本文梳理了从早期自动生成代码到现代 AI 辅助工具的里程碑，指出复杂性和人类解决问题的能力使程序员不可替代。

items.title_en: Show HN: I ported Manim to TypeScript (run 3b1B math animations in the browser)
items.title_zh: Show HN：将 Manim 移植到 TypeScript，在浏览器中运行 3Blue1Brown 的数学动画
items.summary_en: Porting Manim to TypeScript enables browser-based math animations without Python tooling. The project demonstrates bridging a Python-centric toolchain into the web, enabling interactive educational content and broader accessibility.
items.summary_zh: 将 Manim 移植到 TypeScript 使浏览器无需 Python 即可渲染数学动画，展示了把以 Python 为中心的工具链移植到前端的可行性。这一努力有望推动互动教育内容的普及与可访问性。

items.title_en: More Cows, More Wives
items.title_zh: 更多牛群、更多妻子
items.summary_en: A provocative look at how livestock wealth—cows—may influence marriage markets and social structures in different societies.
items.summary_zh: 本文以牲畜财富为切入点，探讨牛等资源如何影响婚娶市场与社会结构。

items.title_en: Modeling cycles of grift with evolutionary game theory
items.title_zh: 用进化博弈论建模骗局循环
items.summary_en: Using evolutionary game theory, the post models cycles of grifters, skeptics, and marks to show why scams persist and how defenders might disrupt them. It highlights dynamics of trust, deception, and countermeasures.
items.summary_zh: 通过进化博弈论建模诈骗者、怀疑者与受害者之间的互动周期，揭示骗局为何持续存在以及防御方如何打破循环，强调信任、欺骗与对策的动态。

items.title_en: From Noise to Image – interactive guide to diffusion
items.title_zh: 从噪声到图像——扩散模型的交互指南
items.summary_en: From Noise to Image provides an interactive tour of diffusion models, showing how random noise evolves into coherent images. The guide helps learners visualize the mechanics behind modern generative AI.
items.summary_zh: 提供扩散模型的互动式演示，展示随机噪声如何逐步形成清晰图像，帮助学习者直观理解现代生成模型的工作原理。

items.title_en: Distributed Systems for Fun and Profit
items.title_zh: 分布式系统：乐趣与利润
items.summary_en: A compact, readable overview of distributed systems design, exploring consistency, fault tolerance, and scalability through practical patterns. The piece blends intuition with engineering pragmatism, making it useful for practitioners building resilient services.
items.summary_zh: 一本简明易懂的分布式系统设计综述，探讨一致性、容错与可扩展性等主题，通过实用模式进行讲解。文中将直觉与工程实用性结合，适合构建高可靠服务的从业者阅读。

items.title_en: Package Managers à la Carte: a formal model of dependency resolution
items.title_zh: 按需定制的包管理器：依赖解析的形式模型
items.summary_en: Proposes a formal framework for dependency resolution to reason about package manager behavior, enabling safer, more flexible strategies. The work clarifies the trade-offs between determinism, performance, and user intent.
items.summary_zh: 提出了一个依赖解析的形式化模型，用于研究包管理器的行为，便于实现更安全、可组合的策略。该模型揭示了确定性、性能和用户意图之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Eschewing Zshell for Emacs Shell (2014)
items.title_zh: 放弃 Zshell，改用 Emacs Shell（Eshell）
items.summary_en: Reflects on using Eshell over external shells like Zsh, highlighting tighter Emacs integration, Lisp scripting, and a workflow that minimizes context switching. The 2014 write-up shares practical experiences and trade-offs for Emacs-centric workflows.
items.summary_zh: 回顾在工作流中放弃外部 shell 而使用 Emacs 内置 Eshell 的经验，强调与 Emacs 的无缝集成、Elisp 脚本化，以及减少上下文切换的优点。此文为 2014 年的实践笔记，讨论了以 Emacs 为中心的工作流的权衡。

items.title_en: Inventing the Lisa user interface – Interactions
items.title_zh: 发明 Lisa 用户界面 — 互动
items.summary_en: An exploration of the Lisa UI's origin and its influence on later graphical interfaces, focusing on design decisions, user interaction patterns, and the legacy of early personal computers.
items.summary_zh: 对 Lisa 用户界面的起源及其对后续图形界面的影响进行探讨，聚焦设计决策、用户交互模式及早期个人电脑的遗产。

items.title_en: New evidence that Cantor plagiarized Dedekind?
items.title_zh: 新证据指向康托尔抄袭了德德金？
items.summary_en: New evidence suggests Cantor may have drawn on Dedekind’s work, reigniting debate over priority in the foundations of set theory. The discussion reframes historical claims about originality and the evolution of infinity concepts.
items.summary_zh: 新证据指向康托尔可能借鉴了德德金的工作，再度点燃关于集合论基础中的优先权之辩。讨论重新构建了关于原创性与无穷概念演进的历史主张。

items.title_en: Time-Travel Debugging: Replaying Production Bugs Locally
items.title_zh: 时光穿梭调试：在本地重现生产环境中的错误
items.summary_en: Time-travel debugging describes deterministic replay of production bugs locally, enabling developers to diagnose issues without deploying to prod. Techniques include capturing inputs, state, and logs to faithfully reproduce issues.
items.summary_zh: 时光穿梭调试实现了对生产环境错误的可确定性重放，使开发者能够在本地诊断问题而无需部署到生产环境。文中介绍了捕获输入、状态和日志等方法，确保问题能够被准确重现。

items.title_en: Ghosts'n Goblins – “Worse danger is ahead”
items.title_zh: Ghosts'n Goblins：’更大的危险在前方’
items.summary_en: Ghosts'n Goblins uses a retro-game framing to warn that greater dangers lie ahead in tech or policy. It argues for cautious risk assessment, robust defenses, and proactive mitigation.
items.summary_zh: 以复古游戏为隐喻，提醒技术或政策领域更大风险即将到来。强调审慎风险评估、健全防御与前瞻性缓解策略。

items.title_en: A Fuzzer for the Toy Optimizer
items.title_zh: 面向 toy 优化器 的模糊测试
items.summary_en: Fuzzing guides design improvements and demonstrates practical approaches for teaching fuzzing concepts.
items.summary_zh: 文中介绍如何为一个 toy 优化器设计模糊测试器，以暴露边界情况和稳健性缺陷，这些往往是单元测试难以发现的。通过模糊测试，作者展示了如何改进设计并教授模糊测试的实践要点。

items.title_en: SHELL: Global Tool for Calling and Chaining Procedures in the System (1965) [pdf]
items.title_zh: SHELL：1965 年的全局调用与流程连接工具（PDF）
items.summary_en: This 1965-era tool provides a global interface for invoking and chaining procedures throughout a computer system, predating modern shells.
items.summary_zh: 这是 1965 年的早期工具，提供在整个系统中调用与串联过程的全局接口，早于现代 Shell 的雏形。

items.title_en: Werner Herzog Between Fact and Fiction
items.title_zh: 沃纳·赫佐格：在事实与虚构之间
items.summary_en: Herzog's interviews and essays probe how truth travels between fact and fiction in documentary cinema and culture. The piece reflects on how his thinking informs media critique and future storytelling.
items.summary_zh: 赫尔佐格的访谈与文章探讨纪录片与文化中真相在事实与虚构之间的流动。他的观点为媒体批评与未来叙事提供了启示。

items.title_en: The man building Team USA's Olympic bobsleds
items.title_zh: 打造美国奥运雪车队雪橇的人
items.summary_en: Profile of a Lake Placid-based engineer designing and building bobsleds for Team USA, detailing the craftsmanship, materials, and iterative design process. It highlights how local resources and hands-on experimentation contribute to elite athletic hardware.
items.summary_zh: 讲述位于 Lake Placid 的一名工程师，如何为美国队打造奥运雪橇，介绍工艺、材料和反复设计的过程。

items.title_en: Seeing Like a Sedan
items.title_zh: 像轿车一样看世界
items.summary_en: Seeing Like a Sedan argues that familiar design and framing influence how we build and experience technology, using car-centric thinking to critique urban and software infrastructures.
items.summary_zh: 以轿车视角审视设计思维如何影响技术构建与使用，借此批判城市与软件基础设施背后的隐性假设。

items.title_en: How Long Is the Coast of Britain? (1967)
items.title_zh: 英国海岸线有多长？（1967）
items.summary_en: How Long Is the Coast of Britain? (1967) is a landmark discussion in fractal geometry showing that coastline length depends on measurement scale, introducing the concept of fractal dimension and scale invariance that reshaped how we model natural forms.
items.summary_zh: 1967 年的这篇论文成为分形几何的里程碑，揭示海岸线长度取决于测量尺度，并引入分形维数与尺度不变性的概念，改变了我们建模自然现象的方式。

items.title_en: Better Activation Functions for NNUE
items.title_zh: NNUE 的激活函数改进
items.summary_en: New activation functions for NNUE yield measurable gains in accuracy and efficiency for chess engines, especially on CPU. This helps improve evaluation speed and reduces energy use on mid-range hardware.
items.summary_zh: NNUE 的激活函数改进在棋类引擎中带来准确性和效率的提升，特别是在 CPU 上的评估速度得到改善，同时降低中端硬件的能耗。
